LanguageData.FCP_Culture_Enclave.description: The 英克雷 represents the remnants of the pre-war United States government, embodying a culture of technological superiority, strict hierarchy, and unwavering loyalty to their vision of a purified America. Members of the 英克雷 are deeply committed to their cause, often viewing themselves as the rightful inheritors of the Earth.
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_Enclave.label: 英克雷
